rationale.completeness: Core requirements met: session persistence to disk and --session flag for resuming. Missing: CLI for session deletion and explicit app-exit flush. The auto-persist after each query/answer mitigates data loss risk.
rationale.correctness: Implementation is sound with proper async/await, error handling for missing sessions, and index maintenance. Minor concern: no explicit save on process exit - relies on auto-persist, which works but could risk losing the last message if process crashes between operations.
rationale.style: Mostly follows TypeScript conventions with good JSDoc. Inconsistency: listSessions is synchronous while others are async. parseArgs could be extracted to its own module. Command flag handling is acceptable.
rationale.quality: Clean code with good separation - session-storage.ts handles persistence, in-memory-chat-history.ts manages chat logic. Well-typed interfaces. Minor duplication in error handling but overall well-structured and maintainable.
